description: BRL cost estimation lookup table. Numbers are public industry benchmarks (USD, Vietnam day-rate region). Override at .odoo-ai/cost-config.json to change rate_region or risk_profile for a specific job.

Standard.description: CE/EE native feature, zero dev. Activate module or enable setting.

Config.description: Standard module exists, requires setup only (no code). Tax config, workflow rule, multi-company setup.

Extension-M.description: _inherit existing model/view, simple extend. Add field, override method, extend view.

Extension-L.description: Multi-model extension, complex workflow, integration adapter, non-trivial report.

Custom-XL.description: New module from scratch, complex business logic, external API integration, no existing model match.

rate_card._note: USD per man-day, Vietnam/Southeast Asia region, Odoo partner rate. Based on public industry benchmarks. For other regions use a job-level override.

risk_multipliers._note: Multiply project base effort by the applicable factor. Multiple factors are NOT multiplied together - use the highest single factor or discuss with PM.

contingency._note: Applied as (1 + contingency_pct) on top of project budget. 'medium' is the default for standard SME projects.

phase_distribution._note: Fractions of the FINAL budget_usd (contingency already included) allocated to each implementation phase. Sums to exactly 1.0 so phase_breakdown reconciles to budget. Contingency is NOT a phase line here - it is applied once via the 'contingency' multiplier in the budget formula; double-listing it would double-count. The 6 implementation phases (0.95) plus a 0.05 project_management/buffer line = 1.0.

customization_coefficient_breaks._description: Map custom_item_pct to Customization_Coefficient for roll-up formula.

cross_module_factor_formula._description: cross_module_factor = 0.08 * max(0, unique_modules - 3). Industry benchmark: +8% effort per module beyond baseline 3.
